work_experience.title: Assembly Division Intern
work_experience.description:
● Assembled hardware (laptops) with high precision, ensuring all components were installed in compliance with standard operating procedures (SOPs).
● Responsible for installing operating systems and required software, guaranteeing optimal device functionality prior to distribution.
● Conducted comprehensive Quality Control (QC) on assembled devices to verify build quality and ensure deployment readiness.

work_experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern
work_experience.description:
● Developed a chatbot to assist researchers with quick, accurate information using data scraping to build a structured knowledge base.
● Extracted and organized data from open-access health journals to support chatbot responses through RAG models with Langchain, integrating it with Django.
● Collaborated with medical and data science teams to analyze chatbot interactions and refine performance.
● Ensured relevant and up-to-date information in responses by regularly updating the knowledge base.
● Applied AI and ML techniques like NLP and LLMs to improve response accuracy and reliability.
● Used PostgreSQL for eficient database management and optimized query performance.
● Used data analysis to track performance metrics and continuously enhance chatbot accuracy

organizations.name: Himpunan Mahasiswa Teknik Informatika (HIMATIF)
organizations.role: Vice Head of Research and Development (R&D) Division
organizations.description:
● Collaborated with team members to develop resources and strategies for the organization's growth and development.
● Assisted in organizing and conducting workshops, seminars, and training sessions for members.
● Contributed to the planning and execution of events aimed at enhancing technical skills and knowledge.

certificates.description: Completed the Kampus Merdeka MSIB internship program as a Machine Learning Engineer, focusing on AI chatbot development using LLM and Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
